title: Scratch Assay Protocol
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.izucf6w

steps.title: Make the “十” glyph in the...
steps.instruction: Make the “十” glyph in the back of 24-well plate medially, with the marker pen.

steps.title: 24 hours after the up-regulation and...
steps.instruction: 24 hours after the up-regulation and down-regulation of the Nrf2, scratches along the “十” mark using the 10-ul pipette tip,trying to keep the tip vertical and not tilted.

steps.title: Wash the 24-well plate three times...
steps.instruction: Wash the 24-well plate three times with PBS, and then ,add 1ml serum-free medium into the 24-well plate.

steps.title: The 24-well plates were cultured in...
steps.instruction: The 24-well plates were cultured in a 37-degree, 5% CO2 incubator. Measure the scratch spacing after culturing cells 0,24,48 hours.
